name: Daily Research Briefing
description: Weekdays at 9:00 AM - Monitor Reddit communities, check competitors, identify product opportunities, assess sprint progress

name: Weekly Financial Briefing
description: Mondays at 8:00 AM - Cash position, runway, payables, inventory alerts, revenue trends

name: Mission Control Maintenance
description: Daily at 11:00 PM - Update all Mission Control dashboards with current data

name: Midday Operations Check
description: Daily at 12:00 PM - Brief check for critical issues (cash, inventory, payables, blocked tasks)

name: Weekly Compliance Sweep
description: Fridays at 3:00 PM - Scan elixserpeptides.com for compliance violations

name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
description: Fridays at 4:00 PM - Compile weekly learning, insights, recommended actions, opportunities, risks
